name: smoothui-context-menu
title: Context Menu
author: SmoothUI
description: Adds an animated keyboard-accessible context menu with nested items.

changes: Replaced monorepo imports for the context-menu primitive, utility, and animation helper with colocated copied files.
Kept the trigger keyboard-focusable, disabled leaf items without an action, and replaced physical icon margins with logical RTL-aware spacing.
Replaced the monorepo utility alias with the colocated copied utility.
Removed the independent CSS open and close animations so reduced-motion handling is controlled by the SmoothUI Motion wrapper.
Added logical RTL spacing, chevron mirroring, and viewport-bounded menu widths.

modifications.change: Replaced monorepo imports with colocated paths, kept the trigger keyboard-focusable, disabled actionless leaf items, and changed icon margins to logical RTL-aware spacing.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component installable, preserve keyboard access, prevent misleading no-op actions, and maintain readable alignment in both text directions.

modifications.change: Replaced the monorepo utility alias, removed redundant CSS entry and exit animations, added logical RTL spacing and chevron mirroring, and bounded menu widths to the viewport.
modifications.reason: Keep reduced-motion output static, avoid narrow-screen overflow, and preserve menu directionality without changing the public contract.
